data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Employs encryption methodologies to protect user data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and AES encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Ensures secure user login and resource access control.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth2 and OpenID Connect for secure authentication.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both automated tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors traffic and system activities to detect malicious activities.

data.title: User Data Privacy
data.description: Implements strict policies for user data handling and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Complies with GDPR and other international data protection regulations.
